final:
module top_module(
  input [3:0] cmp_A,
  input [3:0] B,
  output reg [1:0] EQ_LT_GT
);always @* begin
    if (cmp_A == B) begin
      EQ_LT_GT = 2'b01; // cmp_A is equal to B
    end else if (cmp_A < B) begin
      EQ_LT_GT = 2'b10; // cmp_A is less than B
    end else begin
      EQ_LT_GT = 2'b00; // cmp_A is greater than B
    end
  end

endmodule
